motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def reverseStr(s: str, k: int) -> str:
    start = 0
    end = len(s) - 1
    while start < end:
        if start + k <= end:
            s[start:start + k], s[end - k:end] = s[end - k:end], s[start:start + k]
            start += 1
            end -= 1
        else:
            start += 1
    return s

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
